loading.title: Restoring your session
loading.subtitle: Checking saved credentials and reconnecting to the EN Practice backend.

hero.loginSubtitle: Sign in to continue your learning journey and keep your progress in sync.
hero.registerSubtitle: Create an account to save your progress and access your study experience across devices.

footnote.login: Access and refresh tokens are stored locally so the app can restore your session on the next launch.
footnote.register: Registration follows the same backend schema as web: display name, email and password.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.

common.errorDescription: We could not load your learning launchpad. Pull to refresh or try again in a moment.
common.externalRouteUnsupported: This action points to an external destination that is not enabled on mobile yet.

continueLearning.fallbackTitle: Start with a quick vocabulary review
continueLearning.fallbackDescription: A short review session is the fastest way to get back into your learning loop today.

dailyPlan.title: Daily learning plan
dailyPlan.subtitle: Three focused actions to keep momentum without overloading the first screen.
dailyPlan.emptyDescription: We will suggest a compact learning plan here as soon as new tasks are ready.
dailyPlan.sheetSubtitle: Use this list as your lightweight checklist for the day.

quickPractice.title: Quick practice
quickPractice.subtitle: Short sessions you can start right away when you need a small win.
quickPractice.emptyDescription: Once the API returns compact activities, this section becomes your fast-start rail.

progress.title: Progress snapshot
progress.subtitle: A light feedback block to show how today is moving forward.

learningSession.title: Learning session placeholder
learningSession.description: This route now behaves like a real learning session for navigation and analytics, so the product loop can be verified end to end.

hero.title: Learning command center
hero.subtitle: This dashboard is now the app hub: quick entry points, study momentum, runtime state and a stable shell for the next feature slices.

overview.title: Today's momentum
overview.subtitle: Use these cards as the anchor summary for the home experience while deeper feature data is being wired.

quickAccess.title: Main screens
quickAccess.subtitle: These destinations are now wired into the shell so the team can build each module without changing navigation later.

focus.title: Current build focus
focus.subtitle: The dashboard starts the rollout by exposing the three study surfaces most likely to shape the first real user flows.
focus.dictionarySubtitle: Search, saved words and spaced review loop
focus.writingSubtitle: Prompt flow, editor shell and feedback output
focus.speakingSubtitle: Recording entry, fluency scoring and guided prompts

system.title: Live app state
system.subtitle: Theme, language and runtime preferences are still visible here so the team can verify the base system while building product UI.

dashboard.moduleCardsDictionary: Vocabulary lookup, word details and save actions.
dashboard.moduleCardsIelts: Exam roadmap, task entry and performance snapshots.
dashboard.moduleCardsWriting: Prompt-based writing flow and AI feedback surface.
dashboard.moduleCardsSpeaking: Voice practice, fluency review and speaking drills.
dashboard.moduleCardsProfile: Identity, progress summary and personal settings.
dashboard.moduleCardsLeaderboard: Competitive ranking, friend loops and rewards.

copy.scope: This screen already has route wiring, visual identity and page scaffolding. The next step is to replace placeholder content with real feature flows and data states.
copy.actions: Use this landing page as the first checkpoint for each module before the detailed flows are connected.

hero.title: Dictionary workspace
hero.subtitle: Build the lookup experience here first: search, details, saved words and review entry points.

hero.title: IELTS planner
hero.subtitle: This area is ready for task routing, readiness tracking and score-oriented study plans.

hero.title: Writing studio
hero.subtitle: Use this shell for prompt selection, editor flow, draft history and feedback review.

hero.title: Speaking coach
hero.subtitle: This route is ready for recording entry, practice tracks and speaking feedback loops.

hero.title: Profile hub
hero.subtitle: Personal identity, progress highlights and preference surfaces can now grow from this stable shell.

account.title: Signed-in account
account.subtitle: This profile page now reflects the auth session restored from storage and lets the user log out safely.
account.name: Display name

hero.title: Leaderboard
hero.subtitle: This screen sets up the route for competitive loops, rankings and social motivation features.

hero.title: Appearance settings
hero.subtitle: This page is the base settings demo requested in the handoff. Changes persist with SharedPreferences.

hints.solidPrimary: Solid primary only changes the theme when the active profile is Solid.

locks.mode: Mode is locked by this profile.
locks.background: Background is locked by this profile.
locks.open: This profile does not lock mode or background.

hero.title: Theme preview
hero.subtitle: Use this screen to validate tokens, component feel and module accents before feature pages land.
